Sell Your Texas Home Fast — Any Condition, Any Situation.

No agents. No repairs. No fees. Just a fair cash offer and a closing date that works for you.

Get My Free Cash Offer
🏡

Austin-Based & Texas-Focused

We're a local Texas investment company, not a national call center. When you reach out, you're talking to someone who knows your market and your situation.

💰

What We Offer Is What You Keep

No agent commissions. No closing costs. No repair bills. Our cash offer is your take-home number.

💬

We'll Always Be Straight With You

If selling to us isn't your best move, we'll tell you — and point you toward options that are.

We Work With Texas Homeowners in All Kinds of Situations

You don't have to be in crisis to work with us. We help homeowners who simply want a faster, simpler way to sell — no listings, no showings, no waiting.

🏚️ Facing foreclosure or missed mortgage payments

📋 Going through divorce or probate

👴 Inherited a property you don't want to keep

🏃 Relocating and need to sell on a tight timeline

💸 Behind on property taxes or dealing with liens

🔧 Property needs major repairs you can't or don't want to handle

🏦 Want to skip the realtor and sell directly for cash

😓 Just need a clean exit — fast

Whatever your situation, the first step is a free, no-pressure conversation. We'll listen, walk you through your options, and give you a straight answer.

Talk to Us — It's Free

Before You Do Anything — Know Your Options

Most homeowners facing foreclosure don't know they have choices. Here are the 5 paths available to you:

Reinstate the Loan

Catch up on missed payments before the auction date. This keeps you in the home. We can walk you through whether this is realistic for your situation.

Loan Modification

Work with your lender to restructure your payments. Takes time — and lenders don't always say yes — but worth exploring.

Sell Fast to an Investor

Get a cash offer, close on your timeline, walk away without repairs or agent fees. This is what we do — and we'll be upfront if it's not your best option.

List with an Agent

If you have enough equity and time before auction, a traditional sale may net you more. We'll tell you honestly if this fits your situation.

Let It Go

Sometimes foreclosure or a deed-in-lieu is the cleanest exit. We'll explain what that means for your credit and your future.

Next Steps

Whatever path makes sense for you, the first step is a conversation with someone who understands Texas foreclosure law and your specific situation. That's what the call below is for.

Let's Look at Your Options Together

Free call. No obligation. We'll give you a straight answer — even if that answer is "don't sell to us."

Important Disclosure: U.S. Home Solutions, LLC is a real estate investor. We purchase properties and may assign our purchase contract to another buyer for a fee. We are not a real estate agent or broker. This is not legal or financial advice. Please consult with a qualified attorney or financial advisor regarding your specific situation.
